inputs.label: Mass of Load
inputs.businessContext: The mass of the load being cycled (lifted and lowered).

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass of the load being cycled (lifted and lowered).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Masse der Last, die zyklisch bewegt (angehoben und abgesenkt) wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la charge en cycle (levée et descente).

inputs.label: Lifting Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical distance the load is lifted each cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical distance the load is lifted each cycle.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her çevrimde yükün kaldırıldığı dikey mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Distanz, die die Last pro Zyklus angehoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance verticale de levage de la charge à chaque cycle.

inputs.label: Cycles per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of lift cycles per operating day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of lift cycles per operating day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma günü başına kaldırma çevrimi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cycles de levage par jour ouvré.

inputs.label: Operating Days
inputs.businessContext: Total number of operating days per year or period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of operating days per year or period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık veya dönem başına toplam çalışma günü sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Arbeitstage pro Jahr oder Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de jours ouvrés par an ou période.

inputs.label: System Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall efficiency of the lifting mechanism including motor, transmission, etc. Enter as percentage (0-100).

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall efficiency of the lifting mechanism including motor, transmission, etc. Enter as percentage (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor, şanzıman vb. dahil kaldırma mekanizmasının genel verimliliği. Yüzde olarak girin (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwirkungsgrad des Hubmechanismus einschließlich Motor, Getriebe usw. Eingabe als Prozentsatz (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement global du mécanisme de levage incluant moteur, transmission, etc. Saisir en pourcentage (0-100).

inputs.label: Energy Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour in your currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour in your currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Para biriminizde kilovat-saat başına elektrik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stromkosten pro Kilowattstunde in Ihrer Währung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de l'électricité par kilowattheure dans votre devise.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
